prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve already won half the battle just by showing up. That task? It’s not bigger than your courage. Take one small step—just one. You don’t have to be perfect, just present. Every minute you spend now is a victory over procrastination. You’ve handled hard things before, and you’ll handle this one too. Breathe. Trust yourself. Let go of “should” and embrace “I’m doing this.” Now go show that task who’s in charge. You’ve got this. 💪🔥
